title: Luna the Sea Otter
description: Luna the sea otter was rescued from the rocky shores of central California, where she was found alone, cold, and hungry. After spending several weeks at the Monterey Bay Aquarium in Monterey, California, the orphaned otter moved to her permanent home at the Shedd Aquarium in Chicago, Illinois. Since she was rescued, Luna has received swimming lessons, treats, and plenty of TLC from her loving caregivers. Check out photos of the precious pup.
author: Unknown
